glosses.ja: 響きのある; 大きい音の

sentences.target: L'alarme sonore me réveille chaque matin.

translations.fr: L'alarme sonore me réveille chaque matin.
translations.en: The audible alarm wakes me every morning.
translations.es: El despertador me despierta cada mañana.
translations.de: Der Wecker weckt mich jeden Morgen.
translations.it: La sveglia mi sveglia ogni mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 闹钟每天早上把我叫醒。
translations.yue: 鬧鐘每日朝早都會叫醒我。
translations.pt: O despertador me acorda todas as manhãs.
translations.he: השעון המעורר מעיר אותי בכל בוקר.
translations.tr: Çalar saat beni her sabah uyandırıyor.
translations.vi: Đồng hồ báo thức đánh thức tôi mỗi sáng.
translations.nl: De wekker wekt me elke ochtend.
translations.hi: अलार्म घड़ी मुझे हर सुबह जगाती है.
translations.el: Το ξυπνητήρι με ξυπνάει κάθε πρωί.
translations.ro: Ceasul deșteptător mă trezește în fiecare dimineață.
translations.ja: 目覚まし時計が毎朝私を起こす。

tokens.explanation: Definite article with elision before a vowel; here corresponds to feminine singular (from la) agreeing with 'alarme'; marks definiteness of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP; agrees with the verb in 3rd person singular.
Adjective post-modifying 'alarme'; describes that the alarm is sound-emitting/audible; invariable in form for gender.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person singular; direct object of 'réveille'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'me' as direct object; subject is 'L'alarme sonore'.
Distributive determiner modifying 'matin'; indicates habitual frequency.
Common noun, masculine; head of the temporal NP governed by 'chaque'.

sentences.target: Tu désactives l'alerte sonore au bureau.

translations.fr: Tu désactives l'alerte sonore au bureau.
translations.en: You turn off the sound alert at the office.
translations.es: Desactivas la alerta sonora en la oficina.
translations.de: Du deaktivierst den akustischen Alarm im Büro.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在办公室关闭声音提醒。
translations.yue: 你喺辦公室關閉聲音提示。
translations.ru: Ты отключаешь звуковое уведомление в офисе.
translations.pt: Você desativa o alerta sonoro no escritório.
translations.he: אתה מכבה את ההתראה הקולית במשרד.
translations.vi: Bạn tắt cảnh báo âm thanh ở văn phòng.
translations.ar: أنت تُعطّل التنبيه الصوتي في المكتب.
translations.nl: Je zet de geluidswaarschuwing uit op kantoor.
translations.uk: Ти вимикаєш звукове сповіщення в офісі.
translations.hi: तुम ऑफिस में ध्वनि अलर्ट बंद करते हो.
translations.el: Απενεργοποιείς την ηχητική ειδοποίηση στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Du slår av lydvarslingen på kontoret.
translations.id: Kamu mematikan peringatan suara di kantor.
translations.sv: Du stänger av ljudvarningen på kontoret.
translations.da: Du slår fra lydvarslingen på kontoret.
translations.ja: あなたはオフィスで音の通知をオフにする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object ('l'alerte sonore').
Definite article with elision before a vowel; here corresponds to feminine singular (from la) agreeing with 'alerte'; marks definiteness of the object NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the direct object NP of 'désactives'.
Adjective modifying 'alerte'; describes that the alert relates to sound.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces a locative PP ('au bureau').
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition in 'au bureau' (location).

sentences.target: Sa voix sonore porte dans la salle.
sentences.reading: /sa vwa sɔ.nɔʁ pɔʁt dɑ̃ la sal/

translations.fr: Sa voix sonore porte dans la salle.
translations.ipa: /sa vwa sɔ.nɔʁ pɔʁt dɑ̃ la sal/
translations.en: Their loud voice carries in the room.
translations.es: Su voz fuerte se escucha en toda la sala.
translations.de: Ihre laute Stimme trägt durch den Raum.
translations.it: La sua voce forte si sente in tutta la sala.
translations.ko: 그 사람의 큰 목소리가 방 안에 퍼진다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他那洪亮的嗓音在房间里回荡。
translations.yue: 佢嗰把好響嘅聲喺房入面傳開。
translations.ru: Его громкий голос разносится по комнате.
translations.pt: A sua voz alta ecoa pela sala.
translations.he: הקול הרם שלו נשמע ברחבי החדר.
translations.vi: Giọng nói to của người đó vang khắp căn phòng.
translations.ar: صوته العالي يصل إلى أنحاء الغرفة.
translations.nl: Zijn luide stem draagt door de kamer.
translations.uk: Його гучний голос розноситься по кімнаті.
translations.hu: Az erős hangja messze hallatszik a teremben.
translations.hi: उसकी तेज आवाज कमरे में गूंजती है.
translations.pl: Jego głośny głos niesie się po sali.
translations.el: Η δυνατή του φωνή ακούγεται σε όλη την αίθουσα.
translations.nb: Den høye stemmen hans bærer gjennom rommet.
translations.id: Suaranya yang keras terdengar di seluruh ruangan.
translations.sv: Hans höga röst bär genom rummet.
translations.ro: Vocea lui puternică se aude în toată sala.
translations.cs: Jeho hlasitý hlas se nese místností.
translations.da: Hans høje stemme bærer gennem rummet.
translations.ja: 彼の大きな声が部屋中に響く。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular; agrees with feminine 'voix'; marks possession of the noun.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP.
Adjective modifying 'voix'; denotes a resonant quality.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive here ('to carry/resound'); predicate of the clause.
Preposition introducing a locative PP.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On entend un bip sonore au micro-ondes.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃.tɑ̃ œ̃ bip sɔ.nɔʁ o mi.kʁo‿ɔ̃d/

translations.fr: On entend un bip sonore au micro-ondes.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ɑ̃.tɑ̃ œ̃ bip sɔ.nɔʁ o mi.kʁo‿ɔ̃d/
translations.en: We hear a beeping sound from the microwave.
translations.de: Wir hören einen Piepton von der Mikrowelle.
translations.it: Sentiamo un segnale acustico dal microonde.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们听到微波炉发出哔声。
translations.yue: 我哋聽到微波爐發出嘟嘟聲。
translations.ru: Мы слышим звуковой сигнал из микроволновки.
translations.pt: Ouvimos um bipe vindo do micro-ondas.
translations.tr: Mikrodalga fırından bir bip sesi duyuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi nghe tiếng bíp phát ra từ lò vi sóng.
translations.nl: We horen een pieptoon van de magnetron.
translations.uk: Ми чуємо звуковий сигнал з мікрохвильовки.
translations.hi: हम माइक्रोवेव से बीप की आवाज़ सुनते हैं.
translations.el: Ακούμε έναν ήχο μπιπ από το φούρνο μικροκυμάτων.
translations.nb: Vi hører et pip fra mikrobølgeovnen.
translations.id: Kami mendengar bunyi bip dari microwave.
translations.sv: Vi hör ett pip från mikrovågsugnen.
translations.ro: Auzim un bip de la cuptorul cu microunde.
translations.da: Vi hører et bip fra mikroovnen.
translations.ja: 電子レンジからピッという音が聞こえる。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal pronoun used as subject; generic 'we/one'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'un bip sonore' as direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'bip'.
Common noun (onomatopoeia); head of the direct object NP.
Adjective modifying 'bip'; specifies that the beep is audible.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le'; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; masculine invariable used as singular for the appliance; object of the preposition in 'au micro-ondes'.
